entities.name: V
entities.context: Owner of the knowledge system; communications should sound like V actually wrote them

entities.name: Communications Generator
entities.context: System that transforms style-free drafts into V's voice with validation against anti-patterns

entities.name: Pipeline 1 (Intelligence)
entities.context: Intelligence pipeline that Communications Generator depends on

entities.name: B14 (BLURBS_REQUESTED)
entities.context: Optional dependency; one of B14/B25 must exist to trigger

entities.name: Knowledge System
entities.context: Always loads Knowledge/current/ folder for up-to-date context

entities.name: State Machine
entities.context: Tracks folder states from [P] Processing to [R] Ready for deployment

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company; Knowledge System provides guaranteed up-to-date Careerspan context

entities.name: Transformation pairs
entities.context: Method for converting style-free drafts into V's voice

relationships.context: Depends on Pipeline 1 for stakeholder intelligence
Voice quality criterion: emails/blurbs should sound like V wrote them
Style-free draft transformed via pairs into V's voice
Tracks state transitions [P] to [R] during communications processing
